71.reason: [Error: When p->lchild is NULL, this will cause a segmentation fault (runtime error) because print dereferences a NULL pointer. The code does not check if p->lchild is NULL before calling print recursively.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: When p->lchild is NULL, this will cause a segmentation fault (runtime error) because print dereferences a NULL pointer. The code does not check if p->lchild is NULL before calling print recursively.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: When p->lchild is NULL, this will cause a segmentation fault because print() dereferences a NULL pointer. The function should check for NULL before recursing.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  missing NULL check – may cause segmentation fault if left child does not exist
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Calls print on NULL if left child is missing, causing segmentation fault.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [If p->lchild is NULL, calling print(p->lchild) leads to dereferencing NULL pointer, causing runtime error]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [If p->lchild is NULL, calling print(p->lchild) leads to dereferencing NULL pointer, causing runtime error]
